system.effect: The psyker conjures a massive storm of fire that engulfs a wide area. All creatures within a Psy Rating x 3 metre radius of the target point suffer 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame quality.

description.value: The psyker unleashes a devastating storm of warpfire that cascades over a wide area, immolating everything within. All creatures in a Psy Rating x 3 metre radius of the target point suffer 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame quality. Flammable objects in the area are automatically set alight.
